description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the billyteves/alpine-golang-glide:1.2.0 Docker image and defines three stages: build, verify, and publish. Add a global before_script that runs: export GO_PROJECT_PATH="$GOPATH/src/gitlab.com/$CI_PROJECT_NAMESPACE", echo $GO_PROJECT_PATH, mkdir -p $GO_PROJECT_PATH, ln -s $(pwd) $GO_PROJECT_PATH, export GO_PROJECT_PATH="$GO_PROJECT_PATH/$CI_PROJECT_NAME", echo $GO_PROJECT_PATH, cd $GO_PROJECT_PATH, and glide install -v. In the build stage add a go_build job (tagged docker) that executes the command go build. In the verify stage add a go_test job (tagged docker) that executes go test -cover $(go list ./... | grep -v "vendor"). In the publish stage add a go_publish job (tagged docker) that runs go build, saves the resulting binary as an artifact at path $CI_PROJECT_NAME, and is configured to run only on tag pipelines.
